title: Maintained schools: governance guide
body: "This non-statutory guidance is a reference document for those involved in local-authority-maintained school governance. It brings together essential information from a range of sources on the governing body’s roles and legal responsibilities.   This guidance changed format on 19 November 2025. No updates were made to the content.   If you have created a PDF or printed copy, check you have got the following updates made on 25 June 2025.  In 7.3 ‘Funding and finances’ – updated the status of the teachers’ pay additional grant, teachers’ pension employer contribution grant, core schools budget grant, National Insurance contributions grant and the chair’s sign-off of the digital reporting form.  In 7.8.2 ‘Pupil Mental Health and Wellbeing’ – added a section on nutrition.  In 7.8.3 ‘Supporting pupils in school with medical conditions’ – added new guidance including information on the governing bodies’ responsibilities.  In 7.13.3 ‘Complaints to Ofsted’ updated to include qualifying complaints.   "

taxons.title: School and academy financial management and assurance
